content.problemStatement:
Chef has three spells. Their powers are AAA, BBB, and CCC respectively. Initially, Chef has 000 hit points, and if he uses a spell with power PPP, then his number of hit points increases by PPP.

Before going to sleep, Chef wants to use exactly two spells out of these three. Find the maximum number of hit points Chef can have after using the spells.


Input Format

The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first and only line of each test case contains three space-separated integers AAA, BBB, and CCC.


Output Format
For each test case, print a single line containing one integer — the maximum number of hit points.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Example case 1: Chef has three possible options:

Use the first and second spell and have 4+2=64 + 2 = 64+2=6 hitpoints.
Use the second and third spell and have 2+8=102 + 8 = 102+8=10 hitpoints.
Use the first and third spell and have 4+8=124 + 8 = 124+8=12 hitpoints.

Chef should choose the third option and use the spells with power 444 and 888 to have 121212 hitpoints.
Example case 2: Chef should use the spells with power 141414 and 181818.
